programs.title: Grand Designs UK
programs.desc: Plumber Jon Martin and ceramicist Noreen Jaafar build a modern tree house in their home town Gloucestershire. It proves an epic undertaking as their ambitious design comes to life 40 feet up in the canopy.

programs.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programs.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programs.title: Spicks and Specks
programs.sub_title: Ali Mcgregor, Richard Gottehrer, Shane Jacobson & Russell Howard
programs.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Ali McGregor, Richard Gottehrer, Shane Jacobson and Russell Howard.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Quiz show in which the aim is to be interesting. Stephen Fry goes looking for monsters with Sara Pascoe, Josh Widdicombe, Phill Jupitus and Alan Davies.

programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the award-winning comedy panel show. Team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell are joined by guest panellists Richie Anderson, Taj Atwal, Chris McCausland and Katherine Parkinson.

programs.title: Small Town Scandal
programs.desc: With his own legal trouble mounting, Toby must clear his and his dad's names, finish his podcast, deal with a serial killer, navigate the town fair, and solve Uncle Mitch's murder. (Final).
